source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
3 cup of water
	4-inch dried kelp
	2 dried shiitake mushroom
	2 green onions
ingredients.original:
3 cup of water
	4-inch dried kelp
	2 dried shiitake mushroom
	2 green onions

ingredients.item:
2.5 tbsp of gochujang
	1 tsp gochugaru
	1 garlic, minced
	1.5 tbsp sugar
	1 tsp soy sauce
ingredients.original:
2.5 tbsp of gochujang
	1 tsp gochugaru
	1 garlic, minced
	1.5 tbsp sugar
	1 tsp soy sauce

ingredients.item:
1 2oz ramen noodles
	10 rice cakes
	2-3 cabbage leaves, sliced into fours
	1 red chili pepper, sliced (optional)
